mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_account (user_id, username, password_hash, role_type, account_status, salt, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{roleType}, #{accountStatus}, #{salt}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_account SET account_status=#{status} WHERE user_id=#{userId}
UPDATE t_account SET login_attempts = login_attempts + 1 WHERE user_id=#{userId}
UPDATE t_account SET login_attempts = 0 WHERE user_id=#{userId}
UPDATE t_account SET password_hash=#{passwordHash} WHERE user_id=#{userId}
UPDATE t_account SET last_login_time=NOW() WHERE user_id=#{userId}
